verses.text: Tua ciangin Taia kumpipa Hiram in David kiangah kamtaite, taamtak singte, ama-a' dingin inn khat a lamsak dingin leilesuang innlam a siamte, leh khutsiamte zong a puak hi
Tua ciangin David in Israel-te tungah kumpi-in Topa in amah a kipsak khitna leh ama mi Israel-te' hangin ama kumpi gam nakpi takin a lianin a kibawlna a phawktel hi.
David in Jerusalem-ah zi nei thuahin tapate leh tanute a nei hi
Jerusalem-ah a neih a tate' min: Shammua, Shobab, Nathan, Solomon
Elishama, Beeliada, leh Elifelet ahi uh hi.

Israel mi khempeuh tungah kumpi-in David sathau a kinilhna thu Filistia mite in a zak uh ciangin David a zong dingin Filistia mi khempeuh kuanto uh hi. David in zong tua thu za ahih manin amaute a do dingin a kuankhia hi
Tu-in Filistia mite hong pai-in Refaim kuamsung a luh uh hi

Tua ciangin David in Pasian kiangah thu dong a, “Filistia mite a do dingin ka kuanto ding hiam? Keima khutsungah amaute nong pia ding hiam?” a ci hi. Tua ciangin Topa in ama kiangah, “Kuanto in; nangma khutsungah amaute kong pia ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Baalperazim-ah David paito a, amah in tua lai-ah amaute a zo hi. Tua ciangin David in, “Tuikhang in a phulkhap bangin Pasian in keima khut tawh ka galte phukham hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua mun a min Baalperazim kici hi
Filistia mite in tua lai-ah a pasian-te uh nusia uh a, David' thupiakna tawh tuate kihal hi
Tua ciangin Filistia mite hong kuanin kuam sung hong luhkik lai uh hi
David in Pasian kiangah thu a dotkik ciangin Pasian in ama kiangah, “Amaute' nungah na kuanto kei ding hi. Kual pai in la lungli kungte' galkhat lam panin amaute hih in
Lungli kungte dawnah kalsuan huging na zak ciangin galsim dingin pai in; bang hang hiam cih leh Filistia galkapte a vat dingin nangma mai-ah Pasian kuan khin hi,” a ci hi
Pasian in amah a thupiak bangin David gamta a, amaute in Gibeon panin Gezer ciangdong Filistia galkapte vatgawp uh hi
Tua ciangin David' minthan'na in gam khempeuh zel a, Topa in minam dang khempeuh tungah amah kihtakna a tungsak hi.
